const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"certiorari before judgment\" \"Voting Rights Act\"",court:["scotus"],filed_before:"2025-08-26",order_by:"score desc",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","snippet","absolute_url"]});
